title: cayratia papillata
intro: Cayratia papillata, also known as the Himalayan nightshade or five-angle fruit, is a perennial plant species belonging to the grape family (Vitaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Cayratia papillata include reducing fever, treating various skin conditions, and alleviating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and fruits are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
